name: The Long Wager
specialty: Adept at navigating the complex political landscape of the Undercity, often taking on jobs that require delicate diplomacy and covert operations.

members.name: Elias Drake
members.note: Known for his piercing green eyes that never seem to blink, a constant reminder of his unwavering focus.

members.name: Zara Sylph
members.note: A tattoo of a feathered raven adorns her left cheek, symbolizing her exceptional ability to follow trails in the most unlikely of places.

visual: Clad in black leather armor and matching cloaks, they move with a calculated grace, their faces hidden beneath wide-brimmed hats. Their eyes always seem to be scanning the crowd, ever watchful.
reputation_note: Whispers of a team that can get things done, no questions asked, echo through the Undercity. But they're also rumored to have a price, and those who cross them often regret it.
